work.title: Senior Software Engineer @Bold Science
work.description: Owner of scientific communication application used by FDA. Leading team of 5, architecting solutions with React, TypeScript, Python, and AWS serverless infrastructure. Focused on performance optimization, testing strategy, and building engineering culture.

work.title: Lead Software Engineer @Glasswall
work.description: Led architecture and development of file-based protection solutions using React, Electron, TypeScript, and Java Spring Boot. Developed Glasswall Desktop for US government. Managed offshore team and established coding standards.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer @Forest Rock Systems
work.description: Developed N4EnergyManager for visualizing IoT device data and Alarm Manager handling 7M alarms/year for major retailers (Asda, M&S, John Lewis). Drove frontend architectural decisions and mentored team members.

work.title: Software Engineer @Deloitte (Keytree)
work.description: Developed CRM applications for Jaguar Land Rover using React, Redux, and Java Spring Boot. Built London City Airport website with React and NodeJS. Supported multiple clients including TfL, British Gas, and Freshfield.

work.title: Full Stack Developer @Blonk SAAS
work.description: Built recruitment-focused web and React Native mobile app MVP that helped raise EUR 200k. Integrated Stripe payment gateway and created job dashboard for C-level executives.

work.title: Full Stack Developer @SuperFastPixels
work.description: E2E development of web app for movie crew marketplace using React, Meteor, NodeJS, and MongoDB.

work.title: Full Stack Developer @Greenroom
work.description: E2E development of web app for stage artists to find gigs using React, Meteor, NodeJS, and MongoDB.
